notes: Fixed JTS exemplar atoms rewritten in generated-feature format to guide LLM atom generation.

features.description: Example fixed feature: Jaccard overlap of normalized column value sets.
Example fixed feature: maximum directional containment between two column value sets.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    stats_a = ctx["stats_a"]
    stats_b = ctx["stats_b"]
    values_a = stats_a["value_set"]
    values_b = stats_b["value_set"]
    inter = len(values_a.intersection(values_b))
    contain_a = float(inter) / float(len(values_a)) if len(values_a) > 0 else 0.0
    contain_b = float(inter) / float(len(values_b)) if len(values_b) > 0 else 0.0
    if contain_b > contain_a:
        return contain_b
    return contain_a

features.description: Example fixed feature: maximum directional coverage between two column value sets.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    stats_a = ctx["stats_a"]
    stats_b = ctx["stats_b"]
    values_a = stats_a["value_set"]
    values_b = stats_b["value_set"]
    inter = len(values_a.intersection(values_b))
    cov_a = float(inter) / float(len(values_a)) if len(values_a) > 0 else 0.0
    cov_b = float(inter) / float(len(values_b)) if len(values_b) > 0 else 0.0
    return max(cov_a, cov_b)

features.description: Example fixed feature: similarity of uniqueness ratios between two columns.
